text: Benjamin is spinning. Spin, spinning, spinning, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spinjumen. Spenjabin. Are you Spenjamin? Are you Spenjeman? Where is. You're gonna be so dizzy. The perfect time to take a picture. Here I am, here I am. How do you do? Here I am. Here I am, here I am. How do you do? How do you do?
